description: Rank candidate incident summaries against a user query.

body.query: Which document is most relevant to a Neo4j latency regression after an index change?
documents: The observability team upgraded Grafana dashboards and reduced alert noise.
A schema migration changed a Neo4j edge index and increased checkout-api latency until rollback.
A batch job backfilled warehouse metrics from S3 into BigQuery.
The auth service rotated JWT signing keys with no customer impact.
